title: bilabrella dives
intro: Bilabrella dives, also known as Dipsacus fullonum, is a plant species in the family Dipsacaceae, commonly referred to as a type of wild teasel. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Bilabrella dives include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
